acceptance.assertion: The Bureau Resource Registry contains exactly one repository resource with id repo.mitschreiber and parent repo.root.
The resource binds repository_path /home/alex/repos/mitschreiber and the canonical Grabowski key repo:/home/alex/repos/mitschreiber without inventing a second repository identity.
Full Bureau Registry validation and relevant resource/claim tests pass on the exact change.
A fresh Bureau candidate/task assessment or equivalent Registry read can resolve repo.mitschreiber as a valid claim target after merge and runtime refresh.
The change does not modify Mitschreiber bytes, Renovate configuration, Dependabot configuration, GitHub App permissions, Bureau queue state or merge/deployment authority.

approval.note: The user explicitly instructed implementation of Renovate Fleet V1. T046 live planning proved repo.mitschreiber is absent from the Bureau resource catalog; T047 adds only that missing catalog identity through reviewed Registry change.

goal: Add one canonical Bureau repository resource for heimgewebe/mitschreiber so later Renovate consumer work can use exact repository claims and worktree isolation. This task changes only Bureau Registry resource metadata; it does not activate Renovate, mutate Mitschreiber, install a GitHub App, or establish task readiness for the later pilot.

does_not_establish: Mitschreiber pilot is ready or complete
permission to bypass later repository-specific review and lease gates

rollback.strategy: Revert the single resource-registry entry. No consumer repository or external bot state is changed by this task.

title: Register Mitschreiber as a Bureau repository resource
